problem id: 42116e6e
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(2) AND SHR(5)) XOR SHR(6)

examples:
  10010011 -> 00000110
  10010100 -> 00000010
  01110100 -> 00000001
  10010001 -> 00000110
  01110010 -> 00000001
  01001100 -> 00000001
  11101101 -> 00000111

query: 00000010
predicted answer: 00000000
